transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good afternoon, First National Bank. My name is Sandra. Can I take your full name and date of birth for security?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Uh yeah, hi. It's, um — Darren, Darren Oakes. And date of birth is, uh — twenty-first, no — yeah, twenty-first of, um, October. Nineteen, uh, eighty-one.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Mr. Oakes, I've confirmed your identity. How can I help you?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: So, um, I was at your, uh — like the cash machine? On, uh, Field Road? And I took out — like I put in, uh, I asked for a hundred and, uh, I only got, like — [inaudible] — I think it was like sixty? Or maybe eighty? But definitely not a hundred.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. Do you know roughly what time you used the ATM?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Uh, yeah, it was like around — um — maybe twelve, twelve-thirty? Lunchtime, you know.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect. I'm raising a cash discrepancy report for the Field Road ATM, midday today. Your reference number is ATM-2024-3619. The machine will be audited within two working days. If the overage matches your claim, the amount will be refunded automatically.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Oh right yeah. And like — uh — I don't need to do anything else? Like [inaudible] — I don't need to go to the branch or anything?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No, everything is logged from this call. We'll contact you if we need any additional information.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Okay, brilliant. That's, uh — yeah, that's all I needed. Um, cheers.
